## Package Name

Proposed package name:

## Problem Space

What engineering problem should this package solve?

## Why It Belongs in JOC

Explain how this proposal aligns with the ecosystem vision and package philosophy.

## Expected Scope

Describe the intended responsibility and boundaries of the package.

## Related Packages or Prior Art

List similar packages, adjacent JOC work, or references that should inform the design.
